description: Create a content slide on expected changes in the private equity business model in 2019 with a two-column layout: a left table-like horizontal bar chart of agreement levels by change area and a right bullet summary.

header.kicker: Competitive dynamics and the private equity business model
header.headline: More active portfolio management, increase in portfolio's resilience to economic changes ("weatherproof") and geographical exp. in 2019
header.sub: Changes in the private equity business model – 2019 vs. 2018 [%]

rows: Increase in resilience of portfolio to economic changes
More club deals with other PE funds
More cooperation with hedge funds or strategic investors

items.text: The PE business model is expected to change towards more active portfolio management.
The PE business model is expected to change towards an increase in resilience of portfolio to economic changes (the "weatherproof" portfolio company).
The PE business model is expected to change towards expansion into new geographies in 2019.
Minority shareholdings have lost some appeal, whereas cooperation with hedge funds has gained some ground.
